text: Limma is an R package for the analysis of gene expression data.
source_excerpt: Limma is an R package for the analysis of gene expression data

super_pattern.subject: limma
super_pattern.relation: is an R package for analyzing gene expression data

text: Limma uses linear models for analysing designed experiments and assessment of differential expression.
source_excerpt: especially the use of linear models for analysing designed experiments and the assessment of differential expression

super_pattern.subject: limma
super_pattern.relation: enables linear model analysis for designed experiments

text: Empirical Bayesian methods are used to provide stable results even when the number of arrays is small.
source_excerpt: Empirical Bayesian methods are used to provide stable results even when the number of arrays is small

super_pattern.subject: Empirical Bayesian methods
super_pattern.relation: provides stable results despite limited array numbers

text: Law et al. (2014) described voom as unlocking precision weights for linear model analysis of RNA-seq read counts.
source_excerpt:
Law CW, Chen Y, Shi W, Smyth GK (2014).
Voom: precision weights unlock linear model analysis tools for RNA-seq read counts.

super_pattern.subject: voom
super_pattern.relation: unlocks linear model analysis for RNA-seq read counts

text: Law et al. (2016) presented RNA-seq analysis using limma, Glimma, and edgeR as easy as 1-2-3.
source_excerpt: Law CW, Alhamdoosh M, Su S, Dong X, Tian L, Smyth GK, Ritchie ME (2016). RNA-seq analysis is easy as 1-2-3 with limma, Glimma and edgeR.

text: Law et al. (2020) published a guide to creating design matrices for gene expression experiments.
source_excerpt: Law CW, Zeglinski K, Dong X, Alhamdoosh M, Smyth GK, Ritchie ME (2020). A guide to creating design matrices for gene expression experiments.
